title: Natural Wicker Storage Basket with Lining Hamper Baskets for Gifts Empty Baskets for Shelves (White, Pink Strip, Small)
features: 【Extraordinary Outlook】 Crafted to offer both Functionality and Aesthetic Appeal. The White and Pink Dye used on our Baskets is a ideal match with the Heart-shaped Pendant, the Cotton Liner can Protect the Contents Safe and Clean.
【Design Principle】 The Basket is Designed to reflect the Nature and Comfortability. Made from Eco-Friendly, Renewable Wicker, this Wicker Hamper is both Stylish and Environmentally responsible.

【Applied Occasions】 Restaurant/Store Trade Countertop: In a Home or Restaurant or Store Setting, the Wicker Basket can be Used as a Display or Countertop Organizer. Sweet Gift Basket: Fill the Wicker Basket with an Assortment of Delicious Treats, and Present it as a Thoughtful Gift for Birthdays, Holidays, or Special Occasions.
【Sustainable Quality】 Made with Durable Wicker Materials, this Basket with Robust Construction is designed to Withstand the Rigors of Gift-giving while Maintaining its Elegant Appearance.

【Product Specification】 Small Size External Measurements: Width 28 cm Depth 19 cm Height 12 cm Medium Size External Measurements: Width 33 cm Depth 23 cm Height 15 cm Large Size External Measurements: Width 39 cm Depth 29 cm Height 17 cm
description: Product Description 3 Colours & 3 Sizes Natural Wicker Storage Basket with Cotton Line Perfect for Storage Keep your home organised—store toys, clothes, towels, and more in style. Beautiful Gift Basket Fill with treats or goodies for birthdays, holidays, or special occasions. Perfect for Storage Shelf-Friendly Storage Perfect for Small Items Charming Gift Basket
